1.21.1.0.2.0: Add propeller_bearing, gyroscopic, mounted_potato_cannon, directional_gearshift peripherals; fix laser_pointer method name
1.21.1.0.2.1: Fix off-thread state mutation on setName/setTargetAmount/setLimit; ship docs site at solastrius.github.io/CreateAvionics
1.21.1.0.3.0: Proper Create SCADA; breaking: kinetic getter renames (getKineticSpeed/getInputSpeed → getSpeed; getStressApplied → getStressImpact; getOutputStressApplied → getOutputStressImpact) + gimbal_sensor.getLinearAcceleration now subtracts gravity — see CHANGELOG
1.21.1.0.3.1: gyroscopic_propeller_bearing: add persistent manual-target override (setManualTarget/clearManualTarget/getManualTarget) plus diagnostic reads (getBlockNormal/getTiltAngle/getStabilizationStrength); remove non-functional setTilt/setStrictTilt — see CHANGELOG
1.21.1.0.4.0: wheel_mount peripheral: setSteering/setBrake script overrides plus tire/suspension reads — Create: Offroad now supported
